heading: This Afternoon
text: Partly to mostly cloudy with periods of wildfire smoke. Showers and thunderstorms likely north, chance in the south, and slight chance in the far south; any storms could be strong, with gusty winds. Highs the low to mid 80s south, and mid 70s to lower 80s north. West to northwest winds 10 to 15 mph, and gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Slight chance of an evening shower in the south. Otherwise clouds largely clearing out, and wildfire smoke decreasing from north to south. Lows from the mid 50s to lower 60s, some lower 50s northeast. Northwest winds gusting to 25 mph early, then decreasing to 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Friday
text: Partly to mostly sunny. Highs from the upper 60s to mid 70s north, and upper 70s to mid 80s in the south. West to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, and gusting to 20 mph.
